summary: The test job output shows the push package tests passing, but then displays a generic "FAIL" message with no test details, followed by a make error. The provided context is incomplete and does not show which test package actually failed.
root_cause: A test assertion is failing in an unshown test package (likely pubsub-channel-timeout related based on case ID), but the context is truncated before the failure details appear.
relevant_tests: unknown - context does not show failing test

evidence.reason: Generic FAIL message appears after the push package tests pass, indicating another test package failed
Make command at target test.ci failed with exit code 1, indicating test suite did not complete successfully
CI job ended with error exit code, confirming job failure
The push package tests pass successfully, so the FAIL must be from a different test package not shown in the provided context

suggested_fix: The context provided is incomplete and does not show which test package is failing. Review the full CI log output before the 'FAIL' message to identify the failing test package and its error details.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
